title: My Children Inherit Ease, Not Anxiety
subtitle: An affirmation for choosing what money pattern to pass forward
excerpt: A short daily affirmation for the decision to break a scarcity cycle. Said in the morning, it names the choice: ease and confidence, not the money anxiety of the generation before.

practice.whenToUse: Use as a morning practice when you are working to stop a generational money pattern before it passes to your children.

content.text: A daily affirmation for breaking the chain. Generational money anxiety passes through the things we say and the things we don't say — the flinch at a price, the apology for wanting, the silence when money comes up. This affirmation names the alternative: ease, moved from this generation forward rather than anxiety.
My children inherit ease, not anxiety. This pattern ends with me.

Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Say it again in the moments where the old pattern wants to reassert itself — when you catch yourself saying something about money to your children that you know carries the old anxiety. The affirmation is the redirect, said quietly afterward.
